methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $1.0B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $2.0B - $8.6B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: Wayve
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series D), post-money $8.6B

private.name: Cohere
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series D), post-money $7B

private.name: Hugging Face
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series D), post-money $4.5B

private.name: Hive AI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series D), post-money $2B

data.narrative:
Labelbox is a Series D AI & Software company founded by Manu Sharma, currently valued at $1.0B+ post-money on $189M raised to date. The valuation assessment draws on a peer set of 9 comparable companies—1 public (Palantir) and 8 private entities—operating in the same sector and stage. Primary comparables include Wayve ($8.6B), Cohere ($7.0B), Hugging Face ($4.5B), and Hive AI ($2.0B).

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis, anchoring to the $1.0B last post-money valuation and applying a typical 1.5x Series D step-up multiplier, implies $1.5B. Peer-median analysis across the four primary comps yields a median valuation of $5.8B, with a range spanning $2.0B to $8.6B. The latter reflects material dispersion within the cohort, likely driven by differences in revenue traction, market positioning, and capital efficiency.

Triangulation across these two methods supports a valuation range of $1.3B to $6.6B, with a median point of $3.6B. The wide range reflects genuine uncertainty about where Labelbox sits within the peer distribution relative to factors like customer concentration, product-market fit depth, and path to sustained profitability. Stage-progression anchors the low end conservatively; peer-median reflects current market pricing for comparable AI infrastructure plays. Further diligence on unit economics and ARR growth would refine positioning within this band.
